title: lastrea anisoptera
intro: Lastrea anisoptera, also known as the anisopteris fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, and its rhizome and leaves are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lastrea anisoptera include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lastrea anisoptera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
